$comment: Per-biome and per-mapType generation + behaviour rules. Loaded by src/config/mapgen.ts at module init; runtime validation enforces the schema. Adding a new biome or mapType = add a row here + harness test (M_FUN.ARCH.HARNESS).

QUICKSAND.$comment: Rare BEACH-adjacent 'swirl' hex. Walkable (you can cross it), but harvesting the amber deposit applies disease + fatigue on alternating ticks. Two Discoveries mitigate.

RUINS.$comment: M_V6.CARRY.RUINS-BIOME — set at runtime when a barbarian camp is cleared. Walkable, decorative; gameplay treats it like GRASS but the renderer reads it as 'old camp' (different decoration set). Map-gen never produces this tile (no noise threshold).

volcano.$comment: Tunables for the VOLCANO landmark + LAVA eruption cycle (M_FUN.DYN.VOLCANO). damagePerSecond is continuous HP/sec drain on units stranded on LAVA (volcano damage runs per-frame scaled by dt; wildfire fires per-tickSeconds flat — distinct units, intentional). LAVA is hard-impassable so the only way a unit gets damaged is being on a tile that flips to LAVA under them and not yet evacuated.

quake.$comment: Tunables for the dynamic earthquake event (M_FUN.DYN.QUAKE). On fire, an earthquake picks a non-water tile, flips up to maxFlips tiles in a radius-clusterRadius pattern through a stochastic flip table (HIGHLAND <-> MOUNTAIN_PASS; MOUNTAIN -> MOUNTAIN_PASS to create new passes; small chance for HIGHLAND -> MOUNTAIN to seal a pass). Tile-level mutation routes via flipTileBiome which re-derives walkable + biomeFlags. shakeSeconds drives the HUD camera shake.

wildfire.$comment: Tunables for the dynamic wildfire system (M_FUN.DYN.WILDFIRE). damagePerTick is flat HP loss per spread-tick (NOT per frame; fires once every tickSeconds). maxConcurrent caps the burning-tile registry to bound worst-case main-thread cost on an all-FOREST map.

balanced.$comment: 1v1 RTS — centre-biased funnel; chokepoint between bases.

archipelago.$comment: Multi-island — paintMultiIslandChannels carves 2-3 OCEAN strips across the landmass. Aquatic units (Ferryman) bridge via the SHALLOWS skirt (M_FUN.MAP.UTILISATION).

dry-land.$comment: Badlands — densest mountain + desert blanket instead of lake.
